onComponentTokens.notes: Caret reads against the field bg; tied to --brand-component-bg-default so it follows the role remap.

notes: Form-text archetype peer of input. Multi-line variant: same outlined/filled/underline triplet + same 6 roles + same 6 states.
Sizing model differs: textarea uses min-rows × line-height instead of a fixed height. The --textarea-height-* tokens are retained for data-height='fixed' opt-in.
No prefix/suffix affix slots (textareas don't typically host inline icons). Slots reduce to label + helper.
Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars. Affects focus ring, focus border, focus label color, and caret.
aria-invalid='true' overrides role and applies danger-coloured border across all three variants. Invalid is a STATE, not a role.
Resize axis (--textarea-resize) defaults to 'vertical' — most common ergonomic choice. Override to 'none', 'both', or 'horizontal' per use case.
